subcodes.first_line: O devotees of that compassionate Beloved! His honor Amín hath expressed the utmost praise and glorification for the conduct and demeanor of those friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فدائیان آندلبر مهربان جناب امین نهایت ستایش و نیایش از روش و سلوک ان یاران
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @The Holy Spirit, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
